title: justicia mossambicensis
intro: Justicia mossambicensis, also known as African bush tea or justicia, is a shrub native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of justicia mossambicensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of justicia mossambicensis can be made into tea, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions.
